spec_match.rationale: While it uses real iframe elements, it fakes the responsive resizing mechanics entirely using JS manual height updates inside a setTimeout, rather than testing the native browser propagation.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive with dynamic post addition, adjustable lag slider, metrics readout, and detailed event log.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the dynamic content feed description in the index.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates the dynamic loading lag and scroll-within-scroll UX failure mode of the old pattern.

design_system.rationale: Integrates well with the design system styling.

openQuestions.title: Re-implement Dynamic Content Feed using a real native responsive iframe
openQuestions.detail: The page fakes the responsive iframe sizing using JS styling and a simulated lag slider. Once server.ts is configured to serve child pages with Supports-Responsive-Sizing: 1 header, this page should be refactored to run native responsive resizing directly, letting the browser propagate layout overflow natively and comparing it to a laggy postMessage fallback iframe.
